description: Vanilla JavaScript best practices: version-aware ES feature floors from engines/browserslist/lockfile, strict equality and coercion traps, ESM vs CommonJS interop, async correctness and the event loop, this-binding and closures, immutability, error handling, boundary validation, number precision and BigInt, security at boundaries. Includes /javascript:review.
